title: 6 Pcs Glass Cylinder Vases 18cm,7.1Inch Clear Glass Vase for Flowers Tall Hurricane Candle Holder Clear Bud Vases Round Flower Vase for Wedding Living Room Table Centrepiece Decoration
features: 【Package Included】Set of 6 Tall Glass Vases. Work well with floating candles, pillar candles and flowers.
【Size】18 * 4.7 cm H/D,basic tall vase.Great valued centerpiece thin vase to create a beautiful floral arrangement with pampas grass, roses, tulips and bouquet.

【Best Gift】Cylinder tall thin vase is simple but goes well with nearly every imaginable design for daily décor, holiday, or events. It is a neutral decorative vase that shows off plants without being overstated, and is the most effective decoration for almost all occasions, making a chic and elegant display to show your creativity.
【Quality Material】Crafted with blemish-free, crystal clear glass to maximize visibility. Thick glass makes the wide vase stable, durable and reusable all year round.

【Wide Applications】This is a floral glass vase for home decor, fit for decoration of mantle fireplace, kitchen counter, dining table, living room, bathroom, bedroom. It is also glass vase candle holder centrepiece for large scale events, birthday party or wedding reception, baby shower, Christmas, creating a chic and welcoming ambiance.
